description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal boots with a round toe design from lee cooper add an extra bounce to your step. With a high quality leather upper, they are easy to wear and take off. They look great with jeans, chinos or even your formal trousers. Easy to look spectacular, classy and wow! Upper Leather upper for added durability and style Round toe design for a more stylish look Central lace ups for a more versatile Fit Leather haul loop for ease of wear and to hang shoes from a backpack Outsole TPR outsole with a textured design for maximum grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Upper stitched onto the outsole shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
